props.name: topColor
props.description: Hex color string for the top gradient color of the light pillar.

props.name: bottomColor
props.description: Hex color string for the bottom gradient color of the light pillar.

props.name: intensity
props.description: Controls the overall brightness and intensity of the effect.

props.name: rotationSpeed
props.description: Speed multiplier for the pillar rotation animation.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Enable mouse interaction to control the pillar rotation.

props.name: glowAmount
props.description: Controls the glow intensity and spread of the light effect.

props.name: pillarHeight
props.description: Height scaling factor for the pillar distortion.

props.name: noiseIntensity
props.description: Intensity of the film grain noise postprocessing effect.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names to apply to the container element.

props.name: mixBlendMode
props.description: CSS mix-blend-mode property to control how the component blends with its background.

props.name: pillarRotation
props.description: Rotation angle of the pillar in degrees (0-360).
